en: Down the line, trumpets, bar 7 and 8. 3, 4.
Trombone, bar 24, the and of 2. Maybe not.
ko: 트롬본, 24번 마디, 2의 앤드. 아마 아닐 거야.

en: Tenor, let's start the pickup to 11. 3, 4.
Same spot. 3, 4. Okay, all right. Well, you're in the first chair.
ko: 같은 자리. 3, 4. 좋아, 알겠어. 너는 1번 자리야.

en: Let's see if it's just because you're cute. 3, 4. Yep, that's fine.
ko: 네가 귀여워서 그런 건지 볼까. 3, 4. 응, 괜찮아.

en: Drums, let's hear a little double time swing.
ko: 드럼, 조금 더블 타임 스윙 해보자.

en: Bass, 5 bars of Donna Lee. All right. All right. All right.
ko: 베이스, 도나 리 5마디. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아.
